title: Graduate Software Trainee Program
short_description: Exciting opportunity for fresh Computer Science graduates to begin their careers in a structured, tech-focused training program.
long_description: Our Graduate Software Trainee Program is designed to bridge the gap between academic learning and professional software engineering. You will work alongside senior developers to build scalable applications while mastering modern tech stacks.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or Software Engineering
Basic understanding of programming and OOP
Familiarity with any programming language (JavaScript, PHP, etc.)
responsibilities: Participate in mentorship and hands-on training
Assist in development tasks under supervision
Learn and apply best coding practices
Work collaboratively in an agile environment
Gain exposure to frontend and backend development
benefits: Exposure to real projects and modern tech stack

application_details.instruction: Submit your application and join our team.

title: Associate Software Engineer (Laravel)
short_description: We are hiring an Associate Software Engineer with Laravel experience to build and maintain scalable backend systems.
long_description: We are looking for a backend specialist to join our core engineering team. This role focuses on building robust server-side logic, managing database schemas, and ensuring high-performance API integration for our diverse product suite.
requirements: Good knowledge of MVC and REST APIs
Understanding of MySQL and database design
Familiarity with Git and deployment workflows
responsibilities: Collaborate with frontend and QA teams
Ensure secure and optimized backend performance

application_details.instruction: Submit your application and join our team.

title: Associate Software Engineer (Vue/React)
short_description: Looking for a frontend-focused Associate Engineer with experience in Vue.js or React to build modern, interactive interfaces.
long_description: We are seeking a talented Frontend Engineer to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for translating design wireframes into high-quality code and building interactive user interfaces that provide a seamless experience across all devices.
requirements: 1-2 years of experience with Vue.js or React.js
Familiarity with Git and version control
responsibilities: Integrate frontend with APIs and backend systems
Collaborate with UI/UX designers and backend teams
Optimize code for performance and maintainability
benefits: Health insurance and paid time off

application_details.instruction: Submit your application and join our team.
